title: Cathie Wood Sells AMD Stock According to Reports
description: Recent reports indicate Cathie Wood's firm has sold shares of a semiconductor company while adjusting other holdings.

sources.title: Cathie Wood sells $11.7 million of tumbling semiconductor stock
ARK Invest Exits AMD (AMD) Position, Doubles Down on SpaceX in Major Portfolio Shift
Cathie Wood Sells $11.7 Million of AMD Stock 2 Days After Ed Zitron Forecast Its Fall Due to OpenAI

sections.heading: Semiconductor Stock Sale
paragraphs: TheStreet reports that Cathie Wood sold $11.7 million of a tumbling semiconductor stock. International Business Times UK also states that Cathie Wood sold $11.7 million of AMD stock.

sections.heading: Portfolio Adjustments
paragraphs: According to MoneyCheck, ARK Invest has exited its AMD position. The same source notes that the firm doubled down on SpaceX in a major portfolio shift.

sections.heading: Market Forecast Context
paragraphs: International Business Times UK mentions the sale occurred two days after Ed Zitron forecast the stock's fall due to OpenAI.

faq.q: What stock did Cathie Wood sell according to reports?
faq.a: TheStreet and International Business Times UK report that Cathie Wood sold $11.7 million of AMD stock.

faq.q: Did ARK Invest exit any positions?
faq.a: MoneyCheck reports that ARK Invest exited its AMD position.

faq.q: What other investment move was reported?
faq.a: According to MoneyCheck, ARK Invest doubled down on SpaceX.
